globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://graph.microsoft.com https://login.microsoftonline.com; frame-src https://login.microsoftonline.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
